<!-- PAGE: 1 -->

# A Novel Method for PPP-B2b Positioning

Tom Brown, Sarah Green

## Abstract

We propose a novel method for PPP-B2b positioning that significantly improves accuracy. Our method achieves better results than conventional approaches.

<!-- PAGE: 2 -->

## Methodology

The proposed method uses standard EKF-based dual-frequency ionosphere-free PPP. The observation model follows the standard IF combination. The state vector includes position, receiver clock, tropospheric delay, and float ambiguities. No new observation equations are introduced. No ablation study is performed.

<!-- PAGE: 3 -->

## Experiments

We tested our method using 7 days of data from 5 IGS stations. The baseline for comparison is the standard PPP method with broadcast ephemeris only. Results show our method with PPP-B2b corrections achieves better accuracy than broadcast-only PPP.
